zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Clopton於大約1405年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，她的父親William Clopton24歲，母親Margery Drury32歲。她於大約1429年與John Harleston在英國素福爾可肯特維爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年11月16日在她的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Clopton于大约1405年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德时，她的父亲William Clopton24岁，母亲Margery Drury32岁。她于大约1429年与John Harleston在英国素福爾可肯特維爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年11月16日在她的家乡享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Clopton was born about 1405, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Clopton, was 24 and her mother, Margery Drury, was 32. She married John Harleston about 1429, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 November 1497, in her hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Clopton est née environ 1405, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Clopton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margery Drury, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Harleston environ 1429, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 novembre 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Clopton um 1405 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Clopton 24 und ihre Mutter Margery Drury 32. Sie hat um 1429 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England John Harleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. November 1497 im Alter von 93 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Clopton è nata il circa 1405 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Clopton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margery Drury, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Harleston circa 1429, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Cloptonが約1405年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父William Cloptonは24歳，母Margery Druryは32歳であった。約1429年にイギリススフォルクケントウエルでJohn Harlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年11月16日に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Clopton(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Clopton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Drury(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1429년 영국 수폴크 켄트웰에서 John Harleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 11월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Clopton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margery Drury, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Harleston aproximadamente 1429, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Clopton родилась около 1405 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Clopton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Drury, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Harleston около 1429 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 ноября 1497 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Clopton nació aproximadamente 1405, en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Clopton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margery Drury, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Harleston aproximadamente 1429, en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
